Bootstrap IntelliSense

Appearance

Bootstrap IntelliSense

Boost your Bootstrap coding with smart autocomplete and instant previews.

Quick Start
Configuration & Features

Smart Autocomplete

Intelligent suggestions for Bootstrap class names. Enter a class name and get instant suggestions.

Class Hover Preview

Hover over any Bootstrap class to see a preview of the CSS properties it applies.

Multiple Bootstrap Versions

Select the Bootstrap version you are using in your project. Support for Bootstrap 3, 4, and 5.

Custom Language Support

Add custom language support for Bootstrap classes in any file type you work with.

Made with ❤
